body.title: Basket schema: formalize basket_schema field, __status__ contract, write-back mechanism
body.result: Settled: dict in metadata, basket_schema=defaults, 3 reserved keys (__status__/__updated__/__error__), all others program-defined. Akien LGTM.
body.description: Habit nodes with run_context:true get basket_schema dict (defaults). batch write-back at end of step chain. __status__ reserved key. stale detection. Depends on #335 design.
